calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Dec-01-2005 Continued To Dec-05-05 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Dec-05-2005 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter came regularly on calendar this day, by assignment from the Department of the Presiding Judge for Court Trial/Prove-Up.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Leticia Perez.
Joanna Kozubal, Esq. Special Appearance for for Plaintiff: Jaues Valley Inn, LLC.
Plaintiff's Witness: Mr. Erickson, was sworn and direct examined.
No appearance by the Defendant: Matthew Beals.
Exhibit 1 - Lease Agreement-------------------------ID/EVID.
Exhibit 2 - Three-Day Notice to pay of quit---------ID/EVID.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defendant as follows:
Restitution and possession of the premises located at 319 Ivt St., #412A, San Francisco.
Back Rent and Damages of $1,458.35
Attorney's Fees $400.00
Costs $191.30, for a Total of $2,049.65
Rental Agreement declared forfeited.
Counsel stipulated for the return of the Exhibits in open court.
Judgment signed in open court.

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Dec-05-2005 Assigned To Trial Court

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-01-2005 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES: JOANNA KOZUBAL FOR PLAINITFF HAYES VALLEY INN
NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT MATTHEW BEALS

SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE OFF CALENDAR. JURY DEMAND STRICKEN. TO PROCEED AS COURT TRIAL.

COMMISSIONER:SUE KAPLAN; CLERK:BARBARA MORRIS; NOT REPORTED (218)
